EventOperations_listEvents.usage:
params = ListEventsParams(
    date_from="2024-01-01",
    date_to="2024-01-01",
    created_after=datetime.fromisoformat("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
    limit=123
)
response = await client.export.list_events(params=params)

ExportOperations_createExport.usage:
request = ExportRequest(
    start_at="2025-03-20",
    end_at="2025-03-20",
    webhook_url="example"
)
response = await client.export.create_export(request=request)
ExportOperations_createExport.output: Export(id: int, start_at: str, end_at: str, status: str, created_at: datetime)
